penalties.description: This is an instructional video showing demonstration techniques, not a scored performance attempt of the ligating loop task.

reasoning: The video contains only instructional slides and demonstration clips for FLS tasks 4 and 5 (extracorporeal and intracorporeal suturing). No ligating loop task performance is shown. The content is educational material about needle loading techniques and knot tying methods, not a scoreable attempt at task 3.
